title: Datasets used to illustrate the PPVD mashup protocol execution
author: Rodriguez-Garcia, Mercedes
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
Datasets used for the empirical evaluation of the privacy-preserving data mashup protocol. Three data sets can be found:  

 
	 Vertical partition of educational provider A (Input_DataPartition_A.csv) 
	 Vertical partition of educational provider B (Input_DataPartition_B.csv) 
	 Integrated and k-anonymized output dataset by the privacy-preserving data mashup protocol (Output_AnoymizedIntegratedDataset.csv)
steps_raw:
